ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song's genre */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the song belongs to */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album art */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "streaming_url" TEXT /* Streaming URL of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album's genre */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan the user has (e.g., free, premium, family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the song */,
  "first_position" INTEGER /* Whether the song was in the first position in the user's playlist */,
  "clicked" INTEGER /* Whether the user clicked on the song */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has listened to the song */,
  "listen_time" INTEGER /* Total time the user has spent listening to the song (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
